steps.title: Connect perimeter to side length
steps.content:
For a regular polygon, perimeter equals sides times side length. In
$$3x+6y=63$$
the term $6y$ represents figure B's perimeter.

steps.title: Interpret the coefficient
steps.content: Since $y$ is figure B's number of sides, the coefficient multiplying $y$ is the side length. That coefficient is $6$, so each side of figure B is $6$ inches long. The answer is A.
